title: clerodendrum philippinum f. multiplex
intro:
Clerodendrum philippinum f. multiplex, also known as the Philippine glory bower or the many-flowered glory bower, is a flowering plant species in the family Lamiaceae, characterized by its dense, multiple flowers and attractive foliage.

This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to treat various health conditions.

The health benefits of Clerodendrum philippinum f. multiplex include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing.

The herbal preparations of Clerodendrum philippinum f. multiplex include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make medicinal teas, syrups, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
